title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 1 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 1 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 1 2026
summary:
Main
The DCE iron ore futures moved sideways today, with the most-traded contract I2609 closing at 781 yuan/mt,down 0.19% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices edged down 0-3 yuan from the previous day. Traders offered prices in line with the market; steel mills remained cautious and on the sidelines, purchasing as needed; overall market trading atmosphere was sluggish.
